purpose: One first-floor technical 3D layer with exact CAD walls, source-bound windows and doors, editable room finishes, thresholds and the preserved stair void.

coordinate_system.axis: Mesh data stores source X/Y on ground plane and Z as display height; WebGL viewer remaps to Three.js X/Z ground plane with Y up

cad_first_floor_window_infill_source.label: Exact wall-leaf infill below and above window

cad_first_floor_door_header_source.label: Door head from exact plan gap and height dimension

cad_first_floor_window_glass_exact_pane_.label: Exact closed glass-pane polygon from facade CAD

cad_first_floor_window_detail_linework_s.label: Exact facade CAD window detail linework

cad_first_floor_window_main_frame_exact_.label: RAL 9011 main frame face from exact facade CAD polygon

cad_first_floor_window_sash_frame_exact_.label: RAL 9011 sash frame face from exact facade CAD polygon

cad_first_floor_window_sill_exact_source.label: Exterior sill face from exact facade CAD polygon; final stone/metal finish pending source confirmation

cad_first_floor_door_leaf_source.label: Exact door swing leaf plane from first-floor CAD

rules: All 155 main-plan wall hatches remain unchanged and source linked.
Window wall infills use each exact wall-leaf gap; no facade box fit is used.
Window surfaces use exact plan width plus facade-derived sill and head levels.
Door heads use exact CAD wall gaps plus 2.17 m source dimension labels.
Closed facade-CAD pane polygons are promoted as separate glass surfaces; WC panes remain exact-opening fallbacks because their CAD detail has no closed pane polygon.
Main frames, nested sash/frame rings and exterior sills are triangulated only from closed faces in the bound facade CAD line network.
The two WC glass panes are exact faces polygonized from their facade CAD lines; generic full-opening glass rectangles are no longer used.
Small coplanar display offsets separate nested facade faces for review and are explicitly not treated as physical profile depth.
Door leaves use the exact hinge and terminal swing-arc vertex as a zero-thickness source plane; physical thickness and finish remain separate pending properties.
Final frames, fly screens and vents must use their referenced facade component linework.
material_role_rule: Only exact CAD wall leaves sharing the verified first-floor outer boundary receive the Beerse-klinker facade role.
